rationale: Contradictory constraints must block stable decomposition.
Blueprint must include scope and non-goals.
Deferred features must not enter MVP scope.
Ownership conflict must be resolved or marked.
Required integration must appear in map.
Blueprint must not write feature specs.
Impossible offline/sync requirements require escalation.
Blueprint must not leak prior-project context.
Monolith mandate should not be over-decomposed.
Deferred domains should stay out of MVP.
Tradeoff checkpoint is mandatory before final blueprint.
Dominant quality attributes must be max three and unscored.
Runtime topology must include worker when required.
Data ownership unknowns must be visible.
Boundary contract type must be mapped.
Blueprint must not produce binding ADR decision.
Hard constraints must be respected or escalated.
Regression guard against scoring quality attributes.
Exactly three quality attributes are not required.
Clear ownership should not get invented uncertainty.
P0 Core/Foundation is required.
P0 must stay thin and not own feature schema.
Foreign-key owner dependency must control sequencing.
Depends on must record API/event/schema dependencies.
Critical cross-domain journeys are required for QA/E2E handoff.
Horizontal slicing needs explicit justification.
Spec handoff must include boundaries and open decisions.
Regression guard against writing feature specs.
Justified foundation slice should not be rejected.
Valid thin P0 should not trigger invented findings.
